英國英格蘭肯特澤亞爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Theobald II於大約1380年出生在英國英格蘭肯特澤亞爾時，他的父親Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Seal28歲，母親Mrs. John Theobald26歲。他於1412年之前與Isabella Barci在英國肯特澤亞爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1439年3月10日之後在英國英格蘭肯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Theobald II于大约1380年出生在英国英格兰肯特澤亞爾时，他的父亲Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Seal28岁，母亲Mrs. John Theobald26岁。他于1412年之前与Isabella Barci在英国肯特澤亞爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1439年3月10日之后在英国英格兰肯特。

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and English: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements theud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The English surname represents a learned form, re-created from French Théobald. The usual medieval forms of the name in English and German were Tebald and Tibalt (Old French Teobaud, Tibaut). Compare Dewald and Diebold .

variants.name: Dewald
meanings: German: from the personal name Diebold, from Middle High German Dietbold, from Old High German diot ‘people, nation’ + bald ‘brave, strong’. As an American surname this is also an altered form of the cognate Theobald . Compare Davolt , Dawalt , Daywalt , Devault 3, and Dewalt 1.

History: One of the first Dewalds in North America was Johannes Michael Dewald from Medard, a village in the Palatinate, Germany, who arrived at Philadelphia, PA, in 1738 on the ship Glasgow. He married Maria Barbara Schmidt and settled in Berks County, PA. His father's surname was Theobald. Michael's descendants also bear some other altered forms of the surname, including Dewalt, Dawalt, and Davolt. — One of the earliest immigrants who bore the original German surname Dewald was Henry alias He(i)nrich Dewald from the Palatinate, Germany, who arrived in PA in 1766. His descendants mainly bear altered forms of the surname, especially Devault .

variants.name: Tidball
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): variant of   Theobald  .

variants.name: Tebbs
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of Tebb, which is usually from a pet form of the Middle English male personal name Tebbold (see Theobald ).

variants.name: Tipple
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the medieval personal name Tebald, Tibalt (see Theobald ).
German: nickname for a simple person, from Low German tippel ‘point, corner’ (a reference to the pointed shape of a fool's cap).
German: from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name, a pet form of   Dietrich  .

variants.name: Tibbs
meanings: English: variant of Tibb, from the Middle English personal name Tibbe, which was used in the 13th century as both male (from Tibald, see Theobald ) and female name (a shortened form of Tibot, a pet form of Isabel, see Tebbutt ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Theobald II was born about 1380, in Seal, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Seal, was 28 and his mother, Mrs. John Theobald, was 26. He married Isabella Barci before 1412, in Seal, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died after 10 March 1439, in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Theobald II est né environ 1380, à Seal, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Seal, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Theobald, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Barci avant 1412, à Seal, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 10 mars 1439, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Theobald II um 1380 in Seal, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Seal 28 und seine Mutter Mrs. John Theobald 26. Er hat vor 1412 in Seal, Kent, England Isabella Barci geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 10. März 1439 in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Theobald II è nato il circa 1380 nel Seal, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Seal, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John Theobald, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Barci prima del 1412, nel Seal, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 10 marzo 1439, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Theobald IIが約1380年にイギリスイギリスケントセアルで生まれた時，父Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Sealは28歳，母Mrs. John Theobaldは26歳であった。1412年以前にイギリスケントセアルでIsabella Barciと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1439年3月10日以後にイギリスイギリスケントで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Theobald II(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Seal(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Theobald(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1412년 이전 영국 켄트 시에서 Isabella Barci(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1439년 3월 10일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Theobald II nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Seal, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Theobald, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Barci antes 1412, em Seal, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu após 10 de março de 1439, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Theobald II родился около 1380 г. в местности силь, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Seal было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Theobald, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Barci перед 1412 г. в местности силь, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер после 10 марта 1439 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Theobald II nació aproximadamente 1380, en Seal, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Theobald I, Baron Theobald Of Seal, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Theobald, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Isabella Barci antes de 1412, en Seal, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió después de 10 de marzo de 1439, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
